name: Wolfpack Capital Corp.
description: Wolfpack Capital Corp. was a capital pool company based in Canada that operated under the policies of the TSX Venture Exchange. The company focused on the identification and evaluation of potential business opportunities for acquisition, specifically within the mining, oil, and gas sectors. In late 2016, the corporation underwent a corporate restructuring, changing its name to Pulse Oil Corp. following the completion of a qualifying transaction. As a former capital pool company, its primary objective was to facilitate the growth and development of assets through strategic business combinations.
